# acp.cr

> Crystal implementation of the Agent Client Protocol

This is the documentation for acp.cr, a Crystal implementation of the Agent Client Protocol.

## Pages

- [acp.cr](https://acp.cr.hahwul.com/): Crystal implementation of the Agent Client Protocol

## API Reference

- [Client](https://acp.cr.hahwul.com/api-reference/client/): Core ACP client for protocol communication
- [Errors](https://acp.cr.hahwul.com/api-reference/errors/): Error types and error codes
- [PromptBuilder](https://acp.cr.hahwul.com/api-reference/prompt-builder/): DSL for constructing multi-block prompts
- [Protocol Types](https://acp.cr.hahwul.com/api-reference/protocol/): ACP protocol type definitions and enumerations
- [Session](https://acp.cr.hahwul.com/api-reference/session/): High-level session wrapper for ACP operations
- [Transport](https://acp.cr.hahwul.com/api-reference/transport/): Transport layer for ACP communication

## User Guide

- [Basic Usage](https://acp.cr.hahwul.com/user-guide/basic-usage/): Client lifecycle, transport, sessions, and prompting
- [Error Handling](https://acp.cr.hahwul.com/user-guide/error-handling/): Handling errors and edge cases in acp.cr
- [Getting Started](https://acp.cr.hahwul.com/user-guide/getting-started/): Installation, prerequisites, and your first acp.cr program
- [Prompt Builder](https://acp.cr.hahwul.com/user-guide/prompt-builder/): Building rich prompts with the PromptBuilder DSL
- [Streaming](https://acp.cr.hahwul.com/user-guide/streaming/): Real-time streaming of agent responses and updates
